violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Upper apron in ice machine needs cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Top of the beer cooler in the kitchen needs cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles in the kitchen need repaired. Insulation is exposed.
